description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright, with one arm raised and curving above the head to cradle a crescent moon. Behind the figure's head, a series of five-pointed stars form a partial halo, adding a celestial motif. The body is elongated and tapers down to a small, round base, with subtle engraved patterns visible on the surface. The face is featureless, emphasizing abstraction and universality. The material appears to be weathered metal, giving the sculpture a dark, mottled gray-green patina. There is a circular cutout in the torso, possibly for decorative or symbolic effect.
description: A stylized metal sculpture of a human figure with a crescent moon and stars, featuring a weathered gray-green patina and abstract details.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full figure, crescent moon above the head, star halo, and a circular cutout in the torso.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the sculpture's thinness and the depth of the crescent moon and stars behind the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the arrangement of the stars, with the crescent moon arching above.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the sculpture's slender form and the protruding celestial elements.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure with celestial motifs (crescent moon and stars)
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate installation environment.
